<svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="-10.2941 -10.2941 44.5884 44.5884" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="-10.2941" y="-10.2941" width="44.5884" height="44.5884" rx="15" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.1"/>
            <style>
        @keyframes popup {
            0% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(0);
            }
            100% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
        }
        #flutter-logo {
            animation: popup 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55) forwards;
        }
    </style>
    <g id="flutter-logo">
    <title>Flutter</title><path fill="currentColor" d="M14.314 0L2.3 12 6 15.7 21.684.013h-7.357zm.014 11.072L7.857 17.53l6.47 6.47H21.7l-6.46-6.468 6.46-6.46h-7.37z" />
    </g>
</svg>
